description: This file defines CSS classes for fixed and sticky positioning, including responsive variants based on breakpoints, using Sass syntax with variables, mixins, and loops.

methods.name: map-keys
methods.description: Returns the keys of the map $grid-breakpoints, used for responsive breakpoints.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-up
methods.description: Mixin that applies styles for viewports above a certain breakpoint.

methods.name: breakpoint-infix
methods.description: Function that generates infix strings for breakpoint-specific class names.
